summary: Intensive Israeli attacks continue in Gaza, causing civilian injuries, while U.S. air operations intensify over the Persian Gulf. Iranian infrastructure faces cyber disruptions and civilian casualties from a raid in Lamerd, Iran. Israeli fire in southern Lebanon results in civilian deaths, prompting Hezbollah warnings of cease‑fire violations.
key_points: Israeli shelling injured a martyr in Muwasi, Khan Younis, southern Gaza (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372614).
A massive explosion occurred in the Sderot area during an attack on the Gaza Strip (Source: @pkpoi/142945).
U.S. conducted intensive air activity over the Persian Gulf/Oman with 7 KC‑135R/KC‑46A tankers, 2 P‑8A Poseidon patrol aircraft, and 1 E‑3B AWACS (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372617).
Cyberattacks disrupted services at Iran's Melli, Saderat, and Tejarat banks (Source: @shin_persian/7178).
A raid on Lamerd city in Iran's Fars province resulted in civilian martyrdom (Source: @naya_foriraq/79744).
Israeli fire in Nabatieh al‑Fawqa, southern Lebanon killed one civilian and wounded two others (Source: @manniefabian/58663).
Hezbollah reported Israeli fire on civilians in al‑Dair, Nabatieh, killing two civilians (Source: @lelotsenzura/93171).

sections.executive_summary: Intensive Israeli attacks continue in Gaza, causing civilian injuries, while U.S. air operations intensify over the Persian Gulf. Iranian infrastructure faces cyber disruptions and civilian casualties from a raid in Lamerd, Iran. Israeli fire in southern Lebanon results in civilian deaths, prompting Hezbollah warnings of cease‑fire violations.

points: Cyberattacks disrupted services at Iran's Melli, Saderat, and Tejarat banks, affecting financial operations (Source: @shin_persian/7178).
A documented raid on Lamerd city in Fars province, Iran, resulted in the martyrdom of several civilians near the strike site (Source: @naya_foriraq/79744).
IRGC ground forces commander met with the family of martyr Mohammad Bakburr, emphasizing readiness to respond to any U.S. military action (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372609).
A statement attributed to martyr Haj Qasem Soleimani urged vigilance in the current revolutionary Islamic context (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372608).
Israeli shelling in Muwasi, Khan Younis, southern Gaza injured a martyr (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372614).
During an attack on the Gaza Strip, a massive explosion was reported in the Sderot area and its surroundings (Source: @pkpoi/142945).
Israeli forces fired on civilians in Nabatieh al‑Fawqa, southern Lebanon, killing one and wounding two near a bulldozer operation (Source: @manniefabian/58663).
An Israeli Merkava tank was observed targeting the Islamic Resistance near Qalaat al‑Shqif historic castle in southern Lebanon on 12‑06‑2026 (Source: @naya_foriraq/79747).
Hezbollah reported Israeli fire at 11:30 in al‑Dair neighborhood, Nabatieh, killing two civilians, including a municipal worker (Source: @lelotsenzura/93171).
One dead and two wounded were reported from Israeli fire in the southern Lebanese town of Nabatieh al‑Fawqa (Source: @manniefabian/58663).
An attack helicopter was observed heading toward northern occupied Palestine (south Lebanon) (Source: @redlinkleb/27959).
Senior Iranian diplomat warned Tehran would respond to Israeli violations in Lebanon, referencing a recent memorandum with the U.S. (Source: @presstv/195347).
U.S. intensive air activity over the Persian Gulf/Oman includes 7 KC‑135R/KC‑46A refueling aircraft, 2 P‑8A Poseidon maritime patrol planes, and 1 E‑3B AWACS (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372617).

key_developments: Intensive Israeli shelling in Muwasi, Khan Younis, injured a martyr, indicating continued high‑intensity operations in southern Gaza (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372614).
A massive explosion in the Sderot area during a Gaza attack underscores the expanding reach of hostilities beyond Gaza (Source: @pkpoi/142945).
U.S. deployed seven KC‑135R/KC‑46A tankers, two P‑8A Poseidon aircraft, and one E‑3B AWACS over the Persian Gulf, reflecting heightened aerial presence (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372617).
Cyberattacks disrupted Iran's major banks (Melli, Saderat, Tejarat), impacting financial stability (Source: @shin_persian/7178).
A raid on Lamerd city in Iran's Fars province caused civilian martyrdom, highlighting cross‑border strike capabilities (Source: @naya_foriraq/79744).
Israeli fire in Nabatieh al‑Fawqa, Lebanon killed one civilian and wounded two, raising tensions on the northern front (Source: @manniefabian/58663).
Hezbollah warned of cease‑fire violations after Israeli fire killed two civilians in al‑Dair, Nabatieh (Source: @lelotsenzura/93171).
sections.threat_assessment: The conflict remains multi‑theater, with Israel intensifying strikes in Gaza and extending fire into southern Lebanon, provoking Hezbollah retaliation. U.S. aerial operations over the Persian Gulf increase the risk of inadvertent escalation with Iranian forces. Iran's cyber attacks on its own banking sector suggest internal destabilization, while the documented raid on Lamerd indicates external strike capabilities that could broaden the conflict scope.
sections.regional_response: Lebanese authorities report civilian casualties from Israeli fire, prompting Hezbollah to issue warnings of cease‑fire breaches. Iranian officials have signaled readiness to respond to Israeli actions in Lebanon, linking regional security to broader U.S.–Iran dynamics. International observers note the growing U.S. air presence as a stabilizing yet potentially provocative factor in Gulf waters.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of U.S. refueling and surveillance aircraft over the Gulf should focus on flight paths near Iranian airspace to anticipate possible interceptions. Continued cyber activity against Iranian financial institutions may be leveraged for pressure or signal internal dissent. Israeli ground movements near the Lebanese border, especially involving Merkava tanks, warrant close observation for escalation triggers.
